name: diagGetTargetCount
title: diagGetTargetCount
description: Returns the number /n/ of possible diagnostic targets configured. For indices /i/ with 0 ≤ i ≤ n you can retrieve the target qualifier with DiagGetTargetQualifier.
Diagnostic descriptions that cannot work as diagnostic targets are not counted, e.g. descriptions configured as interpretation only are ignored.
return: Error code or number of diagnostic targets.
